Tool Call: retrieve("evidence on predicting outcomes of acute respiratory distress syndrome in children with malignancy")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

You must write at most 2 sentences. Briefly state whether you agree (adding one new reason) or disagree (giving one counterpoint) based on evidence. Then state your final answer choice clearly using \boxed{choice}
I agree with Option A because while ARDS itself has variable mortality depending on severity and comorbidities, in pediatric oncology patients, measurable clinical markers—including oxygenation levels, presence of infections, disease burden, and treatment-related stressors—are consistently correlated with adverse outcomes, allowing clinicians to estimate prognosis despite lack of perfect prediction models. Additionally, recent improvements in mechanical ventilation and supportive therapies suggest that timely interventions guided by these indicators can influence survival trajectories.
